extra.reason: Shipped in PR #4: workspace-excluded spike crate; gear-hash content-defined chunking (~5 KiB mean, 1/16 KiB clamps, per-chunk state reset); git blob OIDs as the single addressing scheme via gix 0.85 (no git2 fallback needed); commits on refs/spike/* with full chunk reachability — survives git gc --prune=now, clone --mirror, fsck --strict. History independence designed in (splice provably bit-identical to fresh bulk_load) and confirmed under adversarial review attack. Gate A inputs: gix needs 0.85+ (RUSTSEC-2025-0140 on older), pulls uluru MPL-2.0 via gix-pack (licence decision needed), no repo-level pack-first writing (loose objects + repack).

Shipped in PR #5: five-property proptest suite (convergent histories, mutate-then-revert, empty-map stability, param isolation, cross-store determinism); 95-98% of generated cases multi-chunk; ~30 s default / PROPTEST_CASES-scalable soak. Review included mutation testing: 3/3 reachable seeded history-independence bugs caught, 2 no-op mutations proved no-op. No property ever failed against the real spike — corroborates PR #4's invariant claim. Enabling changes: bulk_load_with, empty [workspace] table fixing nested-worktree builds.

Shipped in PR #6: reproducible harness (spike bin) + docs/notes/phase0-benchmarks.md. Headlines: 1M bulk load 6.0s; write amplification 4 chunks/update at 1M (O(log n) spine); diff 874ms for ~10k changes (~2 reads/changed key, scale-independent, verified exact); reads 58-170µs p50; 100 commits @1% churn: 176MiB→8.1GiB loose→4.0GiB packed (~17x payload), 17-min gc at 918k loose objects; 5M fully feasible (~2.9GiB RSS). Pack-on-write mitigation explicitly labelled unvalidated (bead acetone-63m.10); bench port to benches/ is acetone-63m.9. Review nits inherited by the port: churn sampling with replacement, warm-up overlap, growth-baseline residue, disk budget ~12GiB peak, scenarios-run-once caveat. Reviewer reproduced 100k results bit-exact; SIGN-OFF approved.
